asset_name: VX-27 Score Bonus Token PBR Texture Pack
created_for: VX-27 FPS game collectible score-points object
notes: Texture pack contains front-face and side-wall / outer-rim maps.
Maps are generated from the score token concept and renamed for direct import into a 3D workflow.
AO and metallic maps are derived utility maps; treat them as a starting point and tune in-engine if needed.
Emissive maps should be plugged into emission with cyan/blue bloom enabled.
Side wall maps are intended as a horizontal unwrap strip around the token rim.

recommended_material_setup.normal: Use *_normal.png as Tangent Space Normal. Flip green channel if your engine requires DirectX/OpenGL conversion.
recommended_material_setup.ambient_occlusion: Use *_ao.png to darken panel seams and recessed details.
recommended_material_setup.emissive: Use *_emissive.png for blue light strips, star, rings, vents, and UI markings.

front_face.description: Circular front face with central score star, VX-27, +100, SCORE BONUS markings, white armor panels and blue core.
front_face.uv_intent: Flat front cap / coin face UV island.

side_walls.description: Horizontal unwrap texture for the cylindrical side wall / outer rim, with repeating armor panels, vents, dark hardware and blue lights.
side_walls.uv_intent: Wrap around the rim/cylinder side. Tile horizontally if needed.

engine_tips.unity_hdrp_urp: Import albedo as sRGB, normal as Normal Map, roughness/metallic/AO as linear grayscale, emissive as sRGB with bloom.
engine_tips.threejs: Use map, normalMap, roughnessMap, metalnessMap, aoMap, emissiveMap. Set emissive color to cyan/blue and tune emissiveIntensity.
engine_tips.blender: Use Principled BSDF: Base Color, Metallic, Roughness, Normal Map node, AO multiply, and Emission/Emission Strength for glow areas.
